subject: saxet canales into king ranch - balancing issue

emails.subject: Re: Saxet Canales into King Ranch - Balancing issue
emails.subject_base: Saxet Canales into King Ranch - Balancing issue
emails.body: Re: Saxet Canales into King Ranch Balancing issue Mary, How are we looking on the rest of our estimates thru King Ranch? do we need to adjust Big Cowboy or 3 Rivers? D Mary Poorman@ENRON 01/10/2001 11:53 AM

emails.subject: Re: Saxet Canales into King Ranch - Balancing issue
emails.subject_base: Saxet Canales into King Ranch - Balancing issue
emails.body: Re: Saxet Canales into King Ranch Balancing issue 7 Sis is averaging 23,000 M/Day. Big Cowboy is pretty dead on. Carol would like for us to gross up for Saxet based on the number of flow days left so that the nomination to the plant takes the payback into account. Mary
